Who we are

Mark Teekman

Senior Front-end Developer with a strong focus on Web Accessibility, currently working at Acato Digital Agency. Mark has mastered and continuously maintains core web skills: HTML, CSS and JavaScript. This fundamental knowledge allows him to work with various JavaScript frameworks, currently favoring Vue.js and Astro.js. Mark uses SCSS or Tailwind CSS for styling and loves building accessible and clean-looking user interfaces.

Peter Padberg

Skilled back-end developer specializing in Laravel who serves as a team lead at Exapps. With his extensive experience in PHP development and team management, he helps guide projects and developers to successful outcomes. Peter is a big fan of Astro.js and is always looking for ways to improve the framework.
